data.title: CEO appointment at Borregaard ASA leads to issuance of 30,000 share options. Details in stock exchange release on May 23, 2025.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Borregaard has granted 30,000 share options linked to the appointment of the CEO. This decision was announced in a stock exchange release dated May 23, 2025.

data.title: Reddit reports strong Q2 with adjusted EBITDA of $167 million on $500 million revenue, achieving 33% margins. Revenue grew 78%.
data.description: Reddit Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) showcased a robust performance in the second quarter, bringing its profitability metrics closer to established social networking giants like Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META). In the latest earnings call, the company disclosed an impressive adjusted EBITDA of $167 million out of a total revenue of $500 million, resulting in strong EBITDA margins of 33%. This achievement was primarily fueled by accelerated top-line growth and effective cost management during the quarter. Reddit's CFO, Drew Vollero, highlighted the success by stating, "We found a sweet spot this quarter with both revenue growth and profitability," pointing to a notable 78% surge in revenues. This enhanced margin profile indicates Reddit's significant progress towards reaching a competitive position in the social media landscape.

data.title: Brunel Q2 2025 revenue down 12% to EUR 303 million; Gross profit down 20% to EUR 52 million; Underlying EBIT down 46% to EUR 6.3 million. H1 2025 revenue down 11% to EUR 613 million; Gross profit down 19% to EUR 109 million; Underlying EBIT down 45% to EUR 14.7 million.
data.description: Brunel International N.V. announced its Q2 and H1 2025 results. In Q2, revenue was EUR 303 million (down 12%), gross profit was EUR 52 million (down 20%), and underlying EBIT was EUR 6.3 million (down 46%). For H1, revenue was EUR 613 million (down 11%), gross profit was EUR 109 million (down 19%), and underlying EBIT was EUR 14.7 million (down 45%). Free cash flow for H1 was EUR 24.3 million negative. The company is executing a cost reduction program to save EUR 10 million yearly and invested in IT platform with AI capabilities.

data.title: New CEO Tom Erik Foss-Jacobsen takes over Borregaard ASA on 1 August, following notice to Oslo Stock Exchange on 23 May 2025.
data.description: On August 1st, Tom Erik Foss-Jacobsen officially began his role as the new CEO of Borregaard. The announcement regarding his appointment was originally disclosed to the Oslo Stock Exchange on May 23, 2025.
Latest update on Bekaert's liquidity agreement shows a notable increase in reserves and funds.
NBPE reveals Director and PDMR Shareholding in latest disclosure; discloses important numbers.
NBPE discloses total voting rights of 315,550,364 shares.

data.title: Own shares transaction executed for a significant sum, affecting total voting rights.
data.description: Police reported 328 new cases of car theft in the city last month, marking a 15% increase compared to the previous month. The authorities have urged residents to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions to prevent such incidents. Additionally, a total of 92 arrests were made in connection with these thefts, with investigations ongoing to track down the remaining culprits. Residents are advised to report any suspicious activities to the authorities to help combat this rising issue.

data.title: AS Tallinna Vesi's Q2 sales hit €19.4 million, boosted by construction services, driving impressive growth.
data.description: In the second quarter, AS Tallinna Vesi reported sales of €19.4 million, with the growth primarily attributed to the strong performance in construction services.

data.title: SAP (NYSE: SAP) to acquire SmartRecruiters, leading TA software provider, to enhance talent acquisition capabilities.
data.description: In a recent development on August 1, 2025, Walldorf, Germany, and San Francisco witnessed SAP (NYSE: SAP) agreeing to acquire SmartRecruiters, a prominent talent acquisition software provider. This acquisition showcases SAP's strategic move to enhance its capabilities in the talent acquisition sector. SmartRecruiters, recognized for its proficiency in high-volume recruitment processes, is identified as a key player in the industry. The agreement signifies a significant step for both companies, consolidating their positions and expertise in the market.

data.title: NXP unveils i.MX 95 series, part of i.MX 9 series processors, offering high-performance computing & 3D graphics.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, NXP Semiconductors N.V. introduced the i.MX 95 series, the newest member of its i.MX 9 series of application processors. This release boasts high-performance computing and immersive 3D graphics featuring Arm Mali™. The i.MX 95 series is set to offer advanced capabilities to users looking for cutting-edge technology in the semiconductor industry. This release by NXP, listed on NASDAQ as NXPI, represents a significant advancement in processing power and graphics quality, providing a glimpse into the future of application processing.

data.title: Chinese and American students foster bonds in Xiamen, enhancing cultural ties. Nyiobhe Reyes finds China 'like home'.
data.description: In Xiamen, China on August 1, 2025, Nyiobhe Anxe Reyes, a high school student from the United States, expressed enthusiasm about his visit to China. He mentioned feeling a strong connection to the country and likened it to feeling at home. Reyes shared this sentiment during a news report from Beijing Review. The individual noted their appreciation for China's greatness and expressed a desire to convey this sentiment to their family.

data.title: XRP surpasses Ethereum in Coinbase Q2 retail revenue as ETH rebounds after a weak Q1.
data.description: During the second quarter, XRP surpassed Ethereum in terms of retail revenue on Coinbase, despite ETH making a comeback from a decline in the first quarter. The revenue generated from XRP transactions on Coinbase outpaced that of Ethereum during this period.

data.title: Trident Group expands globally with Dubai office opening to meet growing demand for home textiles & paper.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Trident Group, a prominent business conglomerate in India and the top producer of terry towels globally, disclosed the opening of a new branch in Dubai. Situated at THTL Trading LLC in Maze Tower close to the Museum of the Future, Sheikh Zayed Road, the office expansion signifies a strategic move by the company.

data.title: Atos reports Half-Year 2025 Results: Operating Margin up to 2.8% (€113m), Revenue down 17.4% (€4,020m); 10 large contracts signed. 50% of Genesis restructuring target reached. Share Purchase Agreement signed for sale of Advanced Computing. Operating in focus with long-term trajectory confirmed.
data.description: Atos, a leading provider of AI-powered digital transformation, achieved significant progress in its Genesis transformation plan according to its half-year 2025 financial results. Revenue decreased by 17.4% organically to €4,020m, while operating margin improved by 15.4% to €113m. Atos SBU operating margin increased to 5.7%, but Eviden SBU's decreased to -7.9%. Free cash flow improved to -€96m from -€593m in H1 2024. Order entry reached €3.3 billion with a Book-to-Bill ratio of 83%. The company signed a share purchase agreement with the French State for the sale of its Advanced Computing activities for an EV of €410m. Atos confirmed its full-year 2025 targets and long-term financial trajectory. Operating margin is expected to reach around 10% by 2028.

data.title: Umicore's Half Year Results 2025: 1.8 billion in revenues, 433 million in adjusted EBITDA, net debt at 1,829 million. CEO optimistic about performance amidst global challenges. Strategy focuses on cash generation and value recovery. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In the first half of 2025, Umicore Group reported strong financial results driven by sustained demand and operational efficiency measures in a favorable metal price environment. Key figures as of June 30, 2025, included revenues of €1.8 billion, adjusted EBITDA of €433 million with a margin of 24.3%, adjusted EBIT of €302 million with a margin of 17.0%, and adjusted net profit of €135 million. The company's focus on operational excellence and capital deployment saw over €50 million in efficiency measures achieved in the first half of the year. Cash flow from operations was €62 million, with a net debt of €1,829 million and a net debt/ LTM adj. EBITDA ratio of 2.28x. Umicore’s CEO Bart Sap expressed satisfaction with the performance, emphasizing the importance of operational efficiencies and cash generation. The company's strategic roadmap to 2028 emphasizes maximizing cash generation from foundation businesses and value recovery in Battery Cathode Materials. Umicore has also restructured its reporting, grouping businesses related to the EV market under a new Business Group called Battery Materials Solutions. The business unit Battery Materials Solutions includes Battery Cathode Materials and Battery Recycling Solutions. In the evolving global context, Umicore remains committed to its circular business model to provide critical metals and materials for various industries.

data.title: Brunel reports Q2 and H1 2025 results in Amsterdam, emphasizing efficiency and resilience in transforming industries.
data.description: Amsterdam, August 1, 2025 - Brunel International N.V. (Brunel; BRNL), a leading global company providing tailored project and workforce solutions to enable sustainable industry advancements through technology and skilled personnel, has disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter and first half of 2025.
